title: Paper on cuddle optimization accepted at CozyCon 2025
description: Cookie's paper "Optimal Lap Positioning for Warmth-Seeking Pomeranians" has been accepted at CozyCon 2025.

title: Invited bark at International Cross-Species Play Workshop
description: Presented findings on cooperative play dynamics between Pomeranians and Ragdoll cats, featuring case study with brother Lucas.

title: PawShake.js v1.0 released
description: Released PawShake.js, an open-source library for modeling treat-acquisition strategies through handshake protocols.
